content.text:
I now have a comprehensive picture. Let me write up the full audit.

---

# Article Contract Audit — Forem

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What this is:** Forem, the open-source Rails monolith that powers dev.to — a social publishing platform (articles, comments, reactions, tags, follows, feeds). Standard Rails layout with a heavy service/worker layer and Sidekiq for async work.

**How the code is organized** (all under `app/`):
- `models/` — ActiveRecord models; shared behavior in `models/concerns/`. Model-namespaced helpers in subdirs (e.g. `models/articles/`, `models/feeds/`).
- `services/` — business logic objects (`Articles::Creator`, `Articles::Destroyer`, `EdgeCache::*`, `Notifications::*`, `Mentions::*`, `Ai::*`). The create/update/destroy orchestration lives here, **not** in controllers.
- `workers/` — Sidekiq jobs (`Articles::*`, `Notifications::*`, `Reactions::*`, etc.), the async tail of nearly every model callback.
- `controllers/` — thin; delegate to services. `queries/` — read-side query objects. `decorators/`, `serializers/`, `liquid_tags/`, `policies/`, `views/`.
- `lib/data_update_scripts/` — one-off data migrations.

**The central content model:** `Article` at `app/models/article.rb` (1,858 lines) — the thing readers publish. Comments, reactions, tags, mentions, notifications, page-views, polls, feed events all hang off it. It is built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/` (`Reactable`, `Taggable`, `Purgeable`, `AlgoliaSearchable`, `LiquidEmbeddable`, `WebpageTrackable`, `Trackable`, `UserSubscriptionSourceable`) and on `app/models/articles/cached_entity.rb` (serialized author/org snapshot). Feed ranking lives in `app/models/articles/feeds.rb` + `app/services/articles/feeds/*`.

---

## Step 2 — The Article contract and what it is built on

**Model:** `app/models/article.rb:1`.

**Concerns it includes** (`article.rb:2-10`):
| Concern | File | What it adds to the contract |
|---|---|---|
| `LiquidEmbeddable` | `concerns/liquid_embeddable.rb:1` | `has_many :liquid_embed_references, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`); after_commit `queue_liquid_embed_sync` / `sync_liquid_embed_metadata` on body/score/published change (`:7-8`) |
| `Reactable` | `concerns/reactable.rb:1` | `has_many :reactions, dependent: :destroy` + `distinct_reaction_categories` (`:5-10`); `sync_reactions_count`, public-reaction category logic |
| `Taggable` | `concerns/taggable.rb:1` | `cached_tagged_with[_any]` scopes (`:6-55`); `before_save :sync_tags_array` (`:57`); `validate_tag_name` |
| `UserSubscriptionSourceable` | `concerns/user_subscription_sourceable.rb:1` | user-subscription source behavior keyed on `user_id` |
| `AlgoliaSearchable` | `concerns/algolia_searchable.rb:1` → `algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1` | Algolia index definition, `indexable`/`indexable_changed?` (`searchable_article.rb:42-48`), `trigger_sidekiq_worker` |
| `WebpageTrackable` | `concerns/webpage_trackable.rb:1` | `has_many :webpage_references, dependent: :delete_all` (`:5`); `before_destroy :capture_webpage_domains` + `after_destroy_commit :queue_webpage_domain_updates` (`:8-9`) |
| `Trackable` | `concerns/trackable.rb:1` (included via Reactable/elsewhere) | analytics event dispatch on create/update/destroy (`:10-15`); `before_destroy :snapshot_trackable_user_ids` (`:14`) |
| `Purgeable` | `concerns/purgeable.rb:1` | Fastly edge purge: `purge`, `purge_all`, `record_key` (`:41-67`) |
| Plus `PgSearch::Model` + `pg_search_scope :search_articles` (`article.rb:8,396`) and a Postgres `update_reading_list_document` trigger (`article.rb:359-382`). |

**Associations other records hang off it** (`article.rb:44-196`, plus concerns):
- Owners: `belongs_to :user` (`:47`), `:organization` (`:46`, optional), `:collection` (`:44`, optional), `:subforem` (`:48`, optional).
- `has_one :discussion_lock dependent: :delete` (`:168`), `has_one :article_activity dependent: :delete` (`:180`).
- `has_many`: `mentions` (`:170`), `comments` polymorphic `dependent: :nullify` (`:171`), `context_notifications` (`:172`), `ai_audits` (`:173`), `feed_events` (`:176`), `notification_subscriptions` (`:177`), `notifications` (`:178`), `page_views` (`:179`), `polls dependent: :destroy` (`:183`), `profile_pins` (`:184`), `rating_votes dependent: :destroy` (`:187`), **`tag_adjustments`** with **no `dependent:`** (`:188`), `context_notes` (`:189`), `trend_memberships`/`trends` (`:192-193`), `concept_memberships`/`concepts` (`:195-196`), plus five scored `top_comments` variants (`:198-241`).
- Reverse `belongs_to :article` declared on: `ArticleActivity` (`article_activity.rb:16`), `ContextNote` (`context_note.rb:2`), `DiscussionLock` (`discussion_lock.rb:9`), `FeedEvent` (`feed_event.rb:6`, optional), `PageView` (`page_view.rb:6`, optional), `Poll` (`poll.rb:12`, optional), `RatingVote` (`rating_vote.rb:2`, `counter_culture :article` at `:15`), `TagAdjustment` (`tag_adjustment.rb:11`), `TrendMembership` (`trend_membership.rb:3`). Polymorphic dependents: `Reaction` (`reactable_type: "Article"`), `Comment` (`commentable_type: "Article"`), `Mention` (`mentionable`).

**Counter caches it maintains:** `counter_culture :user`, `counter_culture :organization` (`article.rb:50-51`) → `users.articles_count` / `organizations.articles_count`. Inbound: `Reaction#counter_culture :reactable` writes `public_reactions_count`/`reactions_count` on the article (`reaction.rb:8-11`); `RatingVote#counter_culture :article` (`rating_vote.rb:15`).

**What a teammate must know before changing it:**
1. Persistence is callback-heavy (`article.rb:295-345`): ~15 `before_validation`, several `before_save`, and a large fan of `after_save`/`after_commit`/`after_update_commit` hooks. Touching attributes triggers cache busts, embeddings, scoring, social images, notifications.
2. It carries **denormalized state**: serialized `cached_user`/`cached_organization` YAML columns (`:386-390`), `cached_user_name`/`cached_user_username`/`path` set in `set_caches` (`:1265-1271`), `cached_tag_list`/`tags_array`, and the `reading_list_document` tsvector maintained by a DB trigger.
3. **Teardown is bespoke**: a `prepend: true` `before_destroy :before_destroy_actions` (`:313`, `:1408-1420`), concern-level destroy hooks (Webpage/Trackable), and dependent options that are a deliberate mix of `:destroy` / `:delete_all` / `:delete` / `:nullify` (and one association — `tag_adjustments` — with none).

---

## Step 3 — How an article and its attached data are handled on change

**Trigger points (services, not controllers):**
- Create: `Articles::Creator.call` (`creator.rb:26-34`) → `Article.new` + `save` → rate-limit, subscribe author, refresh audience segments, complete onboarding.
- Update: `Articles::Updater.call` (`updater.rb:15-33`) → `article.update` → on unpublish removes notifications + busts author cache; on still-published runs `Mentions::CreateAll`; on became-published refreshes segments/onboarding.
- Unpublish: `Articles::Unpublish.call` (`unpublish.rb:5`) → rewrites frontmatter then delegates to Updater.
- Destroy: `Articles::Destroyer.call` (`destroyer.rb:5-22`) → caches comment ids → `article.destroy!` → `Notification.remove_all` for the article and its comments → `EdgeCache::BustUser`.

**Effects that fan out** (mostly enqueued by model callbacks):

*Inline (synchronous, during save/commit):*
- `before_validation` chain — markdown render, slug, dates, title normalization, video embed, subforem default (`article.rb:295-304`).
- `before_save` — `set_cached_entities` (`:305`,`:1615`), `set_all_dates` (`:306`), `calculate_base_scores` (`:308`), `set_caches` (`:310`), `detect_language` (`:311`), `Taggable#sync_tags_array`.
- `after_save :collection_cleanup` (`:317`,`:1229`) — destroys now-empty collection inline.

## Step 5 — How article identity & visibility are guarded

**Visibility scope (the canonical gate):** `scope :published` requires `published == true` **and** `published_at <= Time.current` (`article.rb:411-414`) — so a scheduled article (future `published_at`) is *not* visible even though `published` is true. Nearly every feed/badge/metric/concept query above starts from `Article.published` (e.g. `feeds/basic.rb:13`, `badges/award_streak.rb:38`, `concepts/lookback_worker.rb:31`, `metrics/record_daily_usage_worker.rb:8`). `scheduled?` formalizes the future check (`article.rb:663-665`).

**Search indexability:** `indexable` = `published && score.positive? && published_at < Time.current` (`searchable_article.rb:42-44`); `indexable_changed?` re-evaluates on `published`/`score` change (`:46-48`). Algolia indexing is also globally short-circuited by `disable_indexing` (`algolia_searchable.rb:6`).

**Existence/current-record guards in background work:** workers re-load by id and bail if gone — `find_by(id:)` + `return unless article` in `BustCacheWorker:4-6`, `ScoreCalcWorker:8-9`, `HandleSpamWorker:8`, `GenerateSummaryWorker:13`, `EnrichImageAttributesWorker:8`, `UpdateDependentEmbedsWorker:7`, `Notifications::MilestoneWorker:8`, `CreateRoundRobinModerationNotificationsWorker:20`; `Article.exists?(id:)` in `UpdateArticleActivityWorker:89`; `constantize.find(id)` in `Images::SocialImageWorker:8`.

**Published guards before acting on attached data:**
- Embedding enqueue requires `published?` + score threshold (`article.rb:334-336`, `1808-1817`).
- Social image requires `published` (`article.rb:1673`).
- `bust_tag_pages`/`bust_home_pages` re-check `article.published` and membership in top/featured sets before purging (`bust_article.rb:34,40,44,50`).
- Concept classification skips unpublished: `record.is_a?(Article) && !record.published?` (`classify_record_worker.rb:14`).
- Reactions: `Reaction#permissions` rejects negative reactions when `!reactable&.published` (`reaction.rb:257`); `distinct_categories` joins articles and filters `articles.published = TRUE` (`reaction.rb:42-47`).
- Comments: guard on `commentable.published` (`comment.rb:418`) and `commentable_type == "Article"` (`comment.rb:250,412,462`).

**Identity/path guards:** `path` is recomputed from user/org slug in `set_caches`/`calculated_path` (`article.rb:1257-1271`); slug uniqueness scoped per user (`:266`); `cached_user`/`cached_organization` snapshots refreshed on every save via `set_cached_entities` (`:1615-1618`).

## Step 6 — Blast radius of the contract change

The change is to **how the Article stores and tears down attached data** — i.e. the `dependent:` options + serialized caches + destroy hooks. Ranked by risk:

**🔴 Highest risk (teardown correctness / orphaned rows / page-outs):**
1. **`tag_adjustments` has no `dependent:` option** (`article.rb:188`) — already orphans `TagAdjustment` rows on destroy (`tag_adjustment.rb:11` FK stays pointing at a gone article). Any teardown rework MUST decide its fate; it's the existing latent bug and the easiest to make worse. **Re-verify:** `spec/models/article_destroy_spec.rb`, moderation tag flows.
2. **`comments dependent: :nullify`** (`article.rb:171`) — `Articles::Destroyer` *relies* on nullify and pre-caches `article.comments.ids` before destroy to clean comment notifications (`destroyer.rb:11-18`). Changing comments to `:destroy`/`:delete_all`, or reordering destroy, breaks notification cleanup and the counter logic. **Re-verify:** `spec/services/articles/destroyer_spec.rb`.
3. **`before_destroy_actions` ordering** (`article.rb:313` `prepend: true`, `:1408-1420`) — reads `user.article_ids`/`organization.article_ids` and bulk-busts sibling caches *before* the row is gone. Coexists with `WebpageTrackable#capture_webpage_domains` (`webpage_trackable.rb:8`) and `Trackable#snapshot_trackable_user_ids` (`trackable.rb:14`), all `prepend`/before_destroy — order matters because they snapshot associations that `delete_all` will wipe. **Re-verify:** webpage-domain + trackable-destroy specs.
4. **Counter caches on destroy** — `counter_culture :user`/`:organization` (`article.rb:50-51`) decrement `articles_count`; inbound `Reaction`/`RatingVote` counters (`reaction.rb:8`, `rating_vote.rb:15`) update article counts. Switching a dependent from `:destroy` to `:delete_all` **skips counter_culture and AR callbacks** (per AGENTS.md caveat), silently corrupting counts. Affects: `reactions` (`reactable.rb:5`, currently `:destroy`), `rating_votes`/`polls` (currently `:destroy`).

**🟠 High risk (async tail keyed on the row still existing):**
5. `EdgeCache::BustArticle` (`bust_article.rb:9`) and `BustMultipleCachesWorker` (`:10`) — run after destroy; if attached data they read (tags, user, org) is torn down differently, cache purge keys change.
6. `Notification.remove_all` for article + comments in Destroyer (`destroyer.rb:15-18`) and `notifications`/`notification_subscriptions`/`context_notifications` all `dependent: :delete_all` (`article.rb:177-178,172`) — double-cleanup paths; reorder risk.
7. `LiquidEmbeddable` / `WebpageTrackable` reference tables (`dependent: :destroy` / `:delete_all`) + their sync workers (`SyncLiquidEmbedReferencesWorker`, `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker`) — depend on capturing domains pre-destroy.
8. `recompile_organization_pages` fires `on: destroy` (`article.rb:345`,`:1729`) reading `organization_id`/`published?` post-destroy.

**🟡 Medium risk (read-side; break only if scopes/caches change shape):**
9. Feed ranking (`services/articles/feeds/*`) and `Articles::Feeds` — all assume `Article.published` + denormalized columns (`cached_tag_list`, `path`, `cached_user`).
10. Search: Algolia (`searchable_article.rb`) `indexable`, PgSearch `reading_list_document` trigger (`article.rb:359`), `Search::ReadingList` (`search/reading_list.rb:87`).
11. Analytics/metrics (`metrics/*`, `Trackable`), AI services (`ai/*`), badges/automations/concepts — read article state; resilient to teardown changes but break if `cached_*`/`published` semantics move.

**Must be re-verified after the change (everything that survives a destroy or reads denormalized state):** the destroy-path specs (Destroyer, `article_destroy_spec`, webpage/trackable destroy), counter-cache integrity for user/org/reactions/rating_votes, notification cleanup, and edge-cache busting.

**Specs/fixtures to update or add:**
- Update: `spec/models/article_destroy_spec.rb`, `spec/models/article_spec.rb`, `spec/services/articles/destroyer_spec.rb`, `spec/services/articles/updater_spec.rb`, `spec/services/articles/creator_spec.rb`, `spec/services/edge_cache/bust_article_spec.rb`, `spec/workers/articles/bust_cache_worker_spec.rb`, `bust_multiple_caches_worker_spec.rb`, `spec/models/articles/cached_entity_spec.rb`, `spec/models/article_activity_spec.rb`, `spec/services/articles/feeds_spec.rb`.

- Fixtures: `spec/factories/articles.rb`, `reactions.rb`, `comments.rb`; ensure factories exist for `rating_votes`, `tag_adjustments`, `discussion_lock`, `article_activity`, `context_notes`, `feed_events`, `polls` to drive cascade tests.

---

# Article Contract Audit — Forem

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What this is:** Forem, the open-source Rails monolith that powers dev.to — a social publishing platform (articles, comments, reactions, tags, follows, feeds). Standard Rails layout with a heavy service/worker layer and Sidekiq for async work.

**How the code is organized** (all under `app/`):
- `models/` — ActiveRecord models; shared behavior in `models/concerns/`. Model-namespaced helpers in subdirs (e.g. `models/articles/`, `models/feeds/`).
- `services/` — business logic objects (`Articles::Creator`, `Articles::Destroyer`, `EdgeCache::*`, `Notifications::*`, `Mentions::*`, `Ai::*`). The create/update/destroy orchestration lives here, **not** in controllers.
- `workers/` — Sidekiq jobs (`Articles::*`, `Notifications::*`, `Reactions::*`, etc.), the async tail of nearly every model callback.
- `controllers/` — thin; delegate to services. `queries/` — read-side query objects. `decorators/`, `serializers/`, `liquid_tags/`, `policies/`, `views/`.
- `lib/data_update_scripts/` — one-off data migrations.

**The central content model:** `Article` at `app/models/article.rb` (1,858 lines) — the thing readers publish. Comments, reactions, tags, mentions, notifications, page-views, polls, feed events all hang off it. It is built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/` (`Reactable`, `Taggable`, `Purgeable`, `AlgoliaSearchable`, `LiquidEmbeddable`, `WebpageTrackable`, `Trackable`, `UserSubscriptionSourceable`) and on `app/models/articles/cached_entity.rb` (serialized author/org snapshot). Feed ranking lives in `app/models/articles/feeds.rb` + `app/services/articles/feeds/*`.

---

## Step 2 — The Article contract and what it is built on

**Model:** `app/models/article.rb:1`.

**Concerns it includes** (`article.rb:2-10`):
| Concern | File | What it adds to the contract |
|---|---|---|
| `LiquidEmbeddable` | `concerns/liquid_embeddable.rb:1` | `has_many :liquid_embed_references, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`); after_commit `queue_liquid_embed_sync` / `sync_liquid_embed_metadata` on body/score/published change (`:7-8`) |
| `Reactable` | `concerns/reactable.rb:1` | `has_many :reactions, dependent: :destroy` + `distinct_reaction_categories` (`:5-10`); `sync_reactions_count`, public-reaction category logic |
| `Taggable` | `concerns/taggable.rb:1` | `cached_tagged_with[_any]` scopes (`:6-55`); `before_save :sync_tags_array` (`:57`); `validate_tag_name` |
| `UserSubscriptionSourceable` | `concerns/user_subscription_sourceable.rb:1` | user-subscription source behavior keyed on `user_id` |
| `AlgoliaSearchable` | `concerns/algolia_searchable.rb:1` → `algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1` | Algolia index definition, `indexable`/`indexable_changed?` (`searchable_article.rb:42-48`), `trigger_sidekiq_worker` |
| `WebpageTrackable` | `concerns/webpage_trackable.rb:1` | `has_many :webpage_references, dependent: :delete_all` (`:5`); `before_destroy :capture_webpage_domains` + `after_destroy_commit :queue_webpage_domain_updates` (`:8-9`) |
| `Trackable` | `concerns/trackable.rb:1` (included via Reactable/elsewhere) | analytics event dispatch on create/update/destroy (`:10-15`); `before_destroy :snapshot_trackable_user_ids` (`:14`) |
| `Purgeable` | `concerns/purgeable.rb:1` | Fastly edge purge: `purge`, `purge_all`, `record_key` (`:41-67`) |
| Plus `PgSearch::Model` + `pg_search_scope :search_articles` (`article.rb:8,396`) and a Postgres `update_reading_list_document` trigger (`article.rb:359-382`). |

**Associations other records hang off it** (`article.rb:44-196`, plus concerns):
- Owners: `belongs_to :user` (`:47`), `:organization` (`:46`, optional), `:collection` (`:44`, optional), `:subforem` (`:48`, optional).
- `has_one :discussion_lock dependent: :delete` (`:168`), `has_one :article_activity dependent: :delete` (`:180`).
- `has_many`: `mentions` (`:170`), `comments` polymorphic `dependent: :nullify` (`:171`), `context_notifications` (`:172`), `ai_audits` (`:173`), `feed_events` (`:176`), `notification_subscriptions` (`:177`), `notifications` (`:178`), `page_views` (`:179`), `polls dependent: :destroy` (`:183`), `profile_pins` (`:184`), `rating_votes dependent: :destroy` (`:187`), **`tag_adjustments`** with **no `dependent:`** (`:188`), `context_notes` (`:189`), `trend_memberships`/`trends` (`:192-193`), `concept_memberships`/`concepts` (`:195-196`), plus five scored `top_comments` variants (`:198-241`).
- Reverse `belongs_to :article` declared on: `ArticleActivity` (`article_activity.rb:16`), `ContextNote` (`context_note.rb:2`), `DiscussionLock` (`discussion_lock.rb:9`), `FeedEvent` (`feed_event.rb:6`, optional), `PageView` (`page_view.rb:6`, optional), `Poll` (`poll.rb:12`, optional), `RatingVote` (`rating_vote.rb:2`, `counter_culture :article` at `:15`), `TagAdjustment` (`tag_adjustment.rb:11`), `TrendMembership` (`trend_membership.rb:3`). Polymorphic dependents: `Reaction` (`reactable_type: "Article"`), `Comment` (`commentable_type: "Article"`), `Mention` (`mentionable`).

**Counter caches it maintains:** `counter_culture :user`, `counter_culture :organization` (`article.rb:50-51`) → `users.articles_count` / `organizations.articles_count`. Inbound: `Reaction#counter_culture :reactable` writes `public_reactions_count`/`reactions_count` on the article (`reaction.rb:8-11`); `RatingVote#counter_culture :article` (`rating_vote.rb:15`).

**What a teammate must know before changing it:**
1. Persistence is callback-heavy (`article.rb:295-345`): ~15 `before_validation`, several `before_save`, and a large fan of `after_save`/`after_commit`/`after_update_commit` hooks. Touching attributes triggers cache busts, embeddings, scoring, social images, notifications.
2. It carries **denormalized state**: serialized `cached_user`/`cached_organization` YAML columns (`:386-390`), `cached_user_name`/`cached_user_username`/`path` set in `set_caches` (`:1265-1271`), `cached_tag_list`/`tags_array`, and the `reading_list_document` tsvector maintained by a DB trigger.
3. **Teardown is bespoke**: a `prepend: true` `before_destroy :before_destroy_actions` (`:313`, `:1408-1420`), concern-level destroy hooks (Webpage/Trackable), and dependent options that are a deliberate mix of `:destroy` / `:delete_all` / `:delete` / `:nullify` (and one association — `tag_adjustments` — with none).

---

## Step 3 — How an article and its attached data are handled on change

**Trigger points (services, not controllers):**
- Create: `Articles::Creator.call` (`creator.rb:26-34`) → `Article.new` + `save` → rate-limit, subscribe author, refresh audience segments, complete onboarding.
- Update: `Articles::Updater.call` (`updater.rb:15-33`) → `article.update` → on unpublish removes notifications + busts author cache; on still-published runs `Mentions::CreateAll`; on became-published refreshes segments/onboarding.
- Unpublish: `Articles::Unpublish.call` (`unpublish.rb:5`) → rewrites frontmatter then delegates to Updater.
- Destroy: `Articles::Destroyer.call` (`destroyer.rb:5-22`) → caches comment ids → `article.destroy!` → `Notification.remove_all` for the article and its comments → `EdgeCache::BustUser`.

**Effects that fan out** (mostly enqueued by model callbacks):

*Inline (synchronous, during save/commit):*
- `before_validation` chain — markdown render, slug, dates, title normalization, video embed, subforem default (`article.rb:295-304`).
- `before_save` — `set_cached_entities` (`:305`,`:1615`), `set_all_dates` (`:306`), `calculate_base_scores` (`:308`), `set_caches` (`:310`), `detect_language` (`:311`), `Taggable#sync_tags_array`.
- `after_save :collection_cleanup` (`:317`,`:1229`) — destroys now-empty collection inline.
- `bust_cache` (`:316`,`:1663`) — inline Fastly `purge` of article/user/org + `touch_actor_latest_article_updated_at`, then enqueues async bust.
- `after_update_commit :update_notifications` (`:321`) and `:update_notification_subscriptions` (`:324`) — run synchronously in the commit callback.
- DB trigger `update_reading_list_document` (`:359`) — in-database, every insert/update.

*Asynchronous (Sidekiq):*
- `async_bust` → `Articles::BustCacheWorker` (`:1692`, worker→`EdgeCache::BustArticle.call`).
- `async_score_calc` → `Articles::ScoreCalcWorker` (`:338`,`:1122`).
- `generate_social_image` → `Images::SocialImageWorker` (`:318`,`:1669`).
- `generate_context_notes` → context-note workers (`:319`,`:1143`).
- `create_conditional_autovomits` → `Articles::HandleSpamWorker` (`:315`,`:1682`).
- `enrich_image_attributes` → `Articles::EnrichImageAttributesWorker` (`:338`,`:1700`).
- `detect_code_block_languages` → `Articles::DetectCodeBlockLanguagesWorker` (`:338`,`:1706`).
- `enqueue_generate_embedding` → `GenerateArticleEmbeddingWorker` (`:334`,`:1808`).
- `regenerate_summary_if_content_changed` → `Articles::GenerateSummaryWorker` (`:343`,`:1069`).
- `update_dependent_embeds_if_key_info_changed` → `Articles::UpdateDependentEmbedsWorker` (`:341`,`:1844`).
- `recompile_organization_pages` → `Organizations::RecompilePagesWorker` (`:345`,`:1729`).
- `LiquidEmbeddable#queue_liquid_embed_sync` → `SyncLiquidEmbedReferencesWorker` (`liquid_embeddable.rb:28`).
- `WebpageTrackable#queue_webpage_sync` → `SyncWebpageReferencesWorker` (`webpage_trackable.rb:15`).
- `Trackable` → `Trackable::DispatchWorker` per active adapter (`trackable.rb:106`).
- Algolia: `AlgoliaSearch::SearchIndexWorker` via `trigger_sidekiq_worker` (`searchable_article.rb:37-39`).
- Async notifications: `Articles::PublishWorker` sweeps newly-published articles → Slack + `Notification.send_to_mentioned_users_and_followers` (`publish_worker.rb:9-17`).

*Destroy-specific:* `before_destroy_actions` busts this + sibling-article caches via `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker.perform_bulk` (`:1408-1420`); `WebpageTrackable` captures domains then `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` (`webpage_trackable.rb:18-25`); `Trackable` snapshots user ids then dispatches a `*_destroyed` event (`trackable.rb:14,91-96`); `recompile_organization_pages` fires on destroy (`:345`).

---

## Step 4 — Every dependent of the Article contract

Grouped by area. Each is an individual dependent with file:line and how it touches the article.

### A. Request handling (controllers / queries / decorators / serializers)
- `app/controllers/articles_controller.rb` — primary CRUD; calls Creator/Updater/Destroyer.
- `app/controllers/api/v0/articles_controller.rb` & `api/v1/articles_controller.rb` — API CRUD over articles.
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/articles_controller.rb` — shared API article logic.
- `app/controllers/article_approvals_controller.rb` — toggles `approved`.
- `app/controllers/stories_controller.rb` — public article show/index.
- `app/controllers/stories/articles_search_controller.rb` — article search results.
- `app/controllers/stories/feeds_controller.rb` — feed JSON of articles.
- `app/controllers/stories/pinned_articles_controller.rb` — pinned article lookup.
- `app/controllers/stories/tagged_articles_controller.rb` — tag pages.
- `app/controllers/admin/articles_controller.rb` — admin article management.
- `app/controllers/admin/welcome_controller.rb` — welcome-thread article (uses `cached_admin_published_with`).
- `app/controllers/moderations_controller.rb` — moderation views of an article.
- `app/controllers/comments_controller.rb` — comment create needs commentable Article.
- `app/controllers/reactions_controller.rb` & `api/v1/reactions_controller.rb` — react to articles.
- `app/controllers/dashboards_controller.rb` — author's article dashboard.
- `app/controllers/page_views_controller.rb` — records article page views.
- `app/controllers/video_states_controller.rb` / `videos_controller.rb` / `concerns/api/videos_controller.rb` — video-article state.
- `app/controllers/profile_pins_controller.rb` — pin an article.
- `app/controllers/discussion_locks_controller.rb` — lock article discussion.
- `app/controllers/tag_adjustments_controller.rb` — moderator tag edits on an article.
- `app/controllers/sitemaps_controller.rb` / `sidebars_controller.rb` / `search_controller.rb` / `community_controller.rb` / `pages_controller.rb` — list/link articles.
- `app/controllers/concerns/api/readinglist_controller.rb`, `.../trends_controller.rb`, `.../analytics_controller.rb`, `.../organizations_controller.rb`, `.../users_controller.rb`, `.../comments_controller.rb` — API endpoints surfacing articles.
- `app/queries/articles/active_threads_query.rb:28` — `Article.published.from_subforem` thread list.
- `app/queries/articles/api_search_query.rb:47` — API article search.
- `app/queries/comments/count.rb:24` & `comments/tree.rb:10,28` — comment trees keyed on Article commentable.
- `app/queries/homepage/articles_query.rb`, `app/serializers/homepage/*` — homepage article feed (used by `Search::Article` `services/search/article.rb:13,19`).
- `app/decorators/article_decorator.rb` — view presentation (`readable_publish_date` consumed by Algolia index).
- `app/decorators/mention_decorator.rb`, `notification_decorator.rb` — render article-backed mentions/notifications.

### B. Background work (Sidekiq)
- `app/workers/articles/bust_cache_worker.rb:4-8` — re-finds article, `EdgeCache::BustArticle`.
- `app/workers/articles/bust_multiple_caches_worker.rb:10` — bulk path bust of sibling articles.
- `app/workers/articles/score_calc_worker.rb:8` — `article.update_score`.
- `app/workers/articles/handle_spam_worker.rb:8` — spam check on an article.
- `app/workers/articles/enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb:8` — image enrichment + bust.
- `app/workers/articles/detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb:10` — code-language detection.
- `app/workers/articles/generate_summary_worker.rb:13` — AI summary.
- `app/workers/articles/generate_context_note_worker.rb:8` & `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:9` — context notes.
- `app/workers/articles/update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb:7` — refresh liquid embed cards.
- `app/workers/articles/update_article_activity_worker.rb:35,89` — activity rollups.
- `app/workers/articles/update_page_views_worker.rb:37` & `update_organic_page_views_worker.rb:13` — page-view counts.
- `app/workers/articles/publish_worker.rb:9` — newly-published sweep → Slack + notifications.
- `app/workers/articles/quality_reaction_worker.rb:20` — quality reactions on published articles.
- `app/workers/articles/label_cleanup_worker.rb:41` — automod label cleanup.
- `app/workers/articles/backfill_activities_worker.rb:23` — backfill activity rows.
- `app/workers/generate_article_embedding_worker.rb` — semantic embedding (pgvector).
- `app/workers/sync_liquid_embed_references_worker.rb` & `sync_webpage_references_worker.rb` — concern-driven reference sync.
- `app/workers/linked_domains/update_score_worker.rb` — invoked from WebpageTrackable destroy.
- `app/workers/reactions/bust_reactable_cache_worker.rb:17-26` — busts article on reaction.
- `app/workers/reactions/bust_homepage_cache_worker.rb:11-14` — touches featured articles.
- `app/workers/rating_votes/*` — rating-vote tallies on the article.
- `app/workers/images/social_image_worker.rb:8` — `constantize.find(id)` social image.
- `app/workers/organizations/recompile_pages_worker.rb` — org README recompile.
- `app/workers/comments/*`, `app/workers/follows/*`, `app/workers/emails/*` — reference articles for notifications/digests.

### C. Feeds & ranking
- `app/models/articles/feeds.rb:31` — feed strategy dispatcher.
- `app/services/articles/feeds/basic.rb:13`, `custom.rb:62`, `large_forem_experimental.rb:80,88,108`, `latest.rb:7`, `tag.rb:7,9`, `timeframe.rb:5`, `find_featured_story.rb:31`, `variant_query.rb:131,138,305` — all build on `Article.published` / scopes / `sanitize_sql`.
- `app/services/articles/feeds/article_score_calculator_for_user.rb` — per-user article scoring.
- `app/workers/feeds/*` & `app/services/feed_events/*` — feed-event tracking off articles.
- `app/services/feeds/import.rb:184,296` — RSS import creates Articles; `assemble_article_markdown.rb:215` — dedup via `Article.find_by(feed_source_url:)`.

### D. Notifications & mentions
- `app/services/mentions/create_all.rb:85` — creates mentions/notifications when notifiable is an Article.
- `app/services/notifications/update.rb:15,29` — updates Article/Comment notifications, adds org data for Article.
- `app/services/notifications/remove_all.rb:8`, `remove_all_by_action.rb:8`, `remove_by_spammer.rb:18` — clear Article notifications.
- `app/services/notifications/notifiable_action.rb`, `milestone/*`, `new_comment/*`, `new_mention/*`, `moderation/*`, `subforem_change_notification/*` — build notifications from articles.
- `app/workers/notifications/notifiable_action_worker.rb:8`, `milestone_worker.rb:8`, `subforem_change_notification_worker.rb:8`, `update_worker.rb:8`, `remove_all_worker.rb:8`, `create_round_robin_moderation_notifications_worker.rb:20` — async article notifications.
- `app/services/broadcasts/welcome_notification/*` — welcome-thread article.

### E. Caching
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:9` — purges article + home/tag/profile pages.

## Step 5 — How article identity & visibility are guarded

**Visibility scope (the canonical gate):** `scope :published` requires `published == true` **and** `published_at <= Time.current` (`article.rb:411-414`) — so a scheduled article (future `published_at`) is *not* visible even though `published` is true. Nearly every feed/badge/metric/concept query above starts from `Article.published` (e.g. `feeds/basic.rb:13`, `badges/award_streak.rb:38`, `concepts/lookback_worker.rb:31`, `metrics/record_daily_usage_worker.rb:8`). `scheduled?` formalizes the future check (`article.rb:663-665`).

**Search indexability:** `indexable` = `published && score.positive? && published_at < Time.current` (`searchable_article.rb:42-44`); `indexable_changed?` re-evaluates on `published`/`score` change (`:46-48`). Algolia indexing is also globally short-circuited by `disable_indexing` (`algolia_searchable.rb:6`).

**Existence/current-record guards in background work:** workers re-load by id and bail if gone — `find_by(id:)` + `return unless article` in `BustCacheWorker:4-6`, `ScoreCalcWorker:8-9`, `HandleSpamWorker:8`, `GenerateSummaryWorker:13`, `EnrichImageAttributesWorker:8`, `UpdateDependentEmbedsWorker:7`, `Notifications::MilestoneWorker:8`, `CreateRoundRobinModerationNotificationsWorker:20`; `Article.exists?(id:)` in `UpdateArticleActivityWorker:89`; `constantize.find(id)` in `Images::SocialImageWorker:8`.

**Published guards before acting on attached data:**
- Embedding enqueue requires `published?` + score threshold (`article.rb:334-336`, `1808-1817`).
- Social image requires `published` (`article.rb:1673`).
- `bust_tag_pages`/`bust_home_pages` re-check `article.published` and membership in top/featured sets before purging (`bust_article.rb:34,40,44,50`).
- Concept classification skips unpublished: `record.is_a?(Article) && !record.published?` (`classify_record_worker.rb:14`).
- Reactions: `Reaction#permissions` rejects negative reactions when `!reactable&.published` (`reaction.rb:257`); `distinct_categories` joins articles and filters `articles.published = TRUE` (`reaction.rb:42-47`).
- Comments: guard on `commentable.published` (`comment.rb:418`) and `commentable_type == "Article"` (`comment.rb:250,412,462`).

**Identity/path guards:** `path` is recomputed from user/org slug in `set_caches`/`calculated_path` (`article.rb:1257-1271`); slug uniqueness scoped per user (`:266`); `cached_user`/`cached_organization` snapshots refreshed on every save via `set_cached_entities` (`:1615-1618`).

---

## Step 6 — Blast radius of the contract change

The change is to **how the Article stores and tears down attached data** — i.e. the `dependent:` options + serialized caches + destroy hooks. Ranked by risk:

**🔴 Highest risk (teardown correctness / orphaned rows / page-outs):**
1. **`tag_adjustments` has no `dependent:` option** (`article.rb:188`) — already orphans `TagAdjustment` rows on destroy (`tag_adjustment.rb:11` FK stays pointing at a gone article). Any teardown rework MUST decide its fate; it's the existing latent bug and the easiest to make worse. **Re-verify:** `spec/models/article_destroy_spec.rb`, moderation tag flows.
2. **`comments dependent: :nullify`** (`article.rb:171`) — `Articles::Destroyer` *relies* on nullify and pre-caches `article.comments.ids` before destroy to clean comment notifications (`destroyer.rb:11-18`). Changing comments to `:destroy`/`:delete_all`, or reordering destroy, breaks notification cleanup and the counter logic. **Re-verify:** `spec/services/articles/destroyer_spec.rb`.
3. **`before_destroy_actions` ordering** (`article.rb:313` `prepend: true`, `:1408-1420`) — reads `user.article_ids`/`organization.article_ids` and bulk-busts sibling caches *before* the row is gone. Coexists with `WebpageTrackable#capture_webpage_domains` (`webpage_trackable.rb:8`) and `Trackable#snapshot_trackable_user_ids` (`trackable.rb:14`), all `prepend`/before_destroy — order matters because they snapshot associations that `delete_all` will wipe. **Re-verify:** webpage-domain + trackable-destroy specs.
4. **Counter caches on destroy** — `counter_culture :user`/`:organization` (`article.rb:50-51`) decrement `articles_count`; inbound `Reaction`/`RatingVote` counters (`reaction.rb:8`, `rating_vote.rb:15`) update article counts. Switching a dependent from `:destroy` to `:delete_all` **skips counter_culture and AR callbacks** (per AGENTS.md caveat), silently corrupting counts. Affects: `reactions` (`reactable.rb:5`, currently `:destroy`), `rating_votes`/`polls` (currently `:destroy`).

**🟠 High risk (async tail keyed on the row still existing):**
5. `EdgeCache::BustArticle` (`bust_article.rb:9`) and `BustMultipleCachesWorker` (`:10`) — run after destroy; if attached data they read (tags, user, org) is torn down differently, cache purge keys change.
6. `Notification.remove_all` for article + comments in Destroyer (`destroyer.rb:15-18`) and `notifications`/`notification_subscriptions`/`context_notifications` all `dependent: :delete_all` (`article.rb:177-178,172`) — double-cleanup paths; reorder risk.
7. `LiquidEmbeddable` / `WebpageTrackable` reference tables (`dependent: :destroy` / `:delete_all`) + their sync workers (`SyncLiquidEmbedReferencesWorker`, `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker`) — depend on capturing domains pre-destroy.
8. `recompile_organization_pages` fires `on: destroy` (`article.rb:345`,`:1729`) reading `organization_id`/`published?` post-destroy.

**🟡 Medium risk (read-side; break only if scopes/caches change shape):**
9. Feed ranking (`services/articles/feeds/*`) and `Articles::Feeds` — all assume `Article.published` + denormalized columns (`cached_tag_list`, `path`, `cached_user`).
10. Search: Algolia (`searchable_article.rb`) `indexable`, PgSearch `reading_list_document` trigger (`article.rb:359`), `Search::ReadingList` (`search/reading_list.rb:87`).
11. Analytics/metrics (`metrics/*`, `Trackable`), AI services (`ai/*`), badges/automations/concepts — read article state; resilient to teardown changes but break if `cached_*`/`published` semantics move.

**Must be re-verified after the change (everything that survives a destroy or reads denormalized state):** the destroy-path specs (Destroyer, `article_destroy_spec`, webpage/trackable destroy), counter-cache integrity for user/org/reactions/rating_votes, notification cleanup, and edge-cache busting.

---
